hooks.command:
echo '## Post-Compact Reminder
- Use {{PACKAGE_MANAGER}} as the package manager (bun workspaces: frontend + backend)
- Tailwind: semantic classes (bg-primary, not bg-[#hex])
- Run {{PACKAGE_MANAGER_RUN}} build && {{PACKAGE_MANAGER_RUN}} lint from the repo root before marking task as review
- Read your task file from docs/tasks/ — do not scan the entire frontend/ or backend/ tree
- Frontend code lives in frontend/src/; backend code lives in backend/src/
- Update task status after completing work
- Re-read docs/MEMORY_BANK.md to recover active-task state'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && {{PACKAGE_MANAGER_DLX}} biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
